ground_truth.description: Photo of 5 people standing in front of Giza pyramid. Very obvious.
ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo of five people standing in front of one of the Giza pyramids. This should be very obvious. Daytime, clear weather.

reverse_geocoded.formatted_address: Giza Pyramids, Nazlet El-Semman, Al Haram, Giza Governorate 3512201, Egypt

details.description: A large ancient Egyptian pyramid dominates the background, built of stepped limestone blocks forming a precise triangular silhouette under a bright, slightly hazy blue sky. No smooth casing remains are visible at the apex, suggesting the Great Pyramid rather than Khafre’s pyramid with its partial casing. The foreground shows a broad, pale stone paving/bedrock area with scattered visitors beyond. Five tourists stand in the center front, some wearing patterned headscarves and sunglasses; one holds a camera. The arid Giza Plateau setting is open and sandy with minimal vegetation, conveying a monumental archaeological landscape.

details.description: A group of five tourists poses in front of the Great Pyramid of Giza on a bright, sunny day. The pyramid dominates the background with its stepped limestone blocks forming a near-perfect triangle. The five individuals stand close together on a dusty, sunlit plain, smiling at the camera. They wear light, casual clothing; two men on the ends wear headscarves (keffiyehs) for sun protection, and one man has a camera hanging from his neck. The two women in the middle wear light dresses or tops and sunglasses. In the far background, smaller silhouettes of other visitors and additional pyramid structures are visible under a clear blue sky. The setting is the Giza Plateau, part of the Giza Necropolis, near Nazlet El-Semman, Egypt.

details.description: Five tourists stand on the pale limestone pavement of the Giza Plateau in front of a massive ancient pyramid built of stepped, evenly coursed limestone blocks. The triangular face fills the background and rises to a weathered peak without any remaining smooth casing at the top. The day is bright with thin clouds; scattered visitors are visible across the plateau. Two people wear patterned headscarves, several have sunglasses, and one holds a camera. The scene is a close, frontal view near the base of the largest pyramid at Giza.

details.description: Five people pose together on a dusty foreground at the Giza Pyramids complex, with the Great Pyramid of Giza (Pyramid of Khufu) looming behind them. From left to right: a man wearing a red-and-white checkered headscarf and camera; a woman in a sage green top; a woman in a white dress; a woman in a white wrap blouse with sunglasses; and a man in a white t-shirt with a black-and-white headscarf, holding a jacket. The sky is bright and mostly clear with a few clouds. Other visitors are visible near the pyramid base. Location context: Giza Pyramids complex, Egypt.

details.description: A group of five young adults stands posing for a photograph in the foreground, positioned on the light-colored, rocky limestone bedrock of the Giza Plateau. The group comprises two men and three women arranged in a line. The man on the far left wears a blue button-down shirt, jeans, and a red-and-white checkered keffiyeh, holding a camera. The man on the far right wears a white t-shirt, jeans, and a black-and-white keffiyeh, holding a jacket. The three women in the center are dressed in casual attire, including a green t-shirt with black wide-leg pants, a long white button-down dress, and a white wrap top with black leggings. Behind them looms the massive Great Pyramid of Giza, filling the majority of the background. The pyramid's rough, stepped construction of large limestone blocks is clearly visible, tapering to a weathered point against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. Small figures of other tourists can be seen in the distance at the base of the pyramid.

details.description: A group of five young adults, three women and two men, are posing for a photograph on a sandy, rocky terrain. In the background, the massive Great Pyramid of Giza rises prominently against a bright, slightly hazy sky. The pyramid is constructed from large, weathered limestone blocks. The individuals are dressed in casual travel attire; the two men are wearing traditional patterned keffiyehs (headscarves) wrapped around their heads. The ground is uneven with visible cracks and loose stones, characteristic of the Giza Plateau. Other tourists and structures are visible in the far distance at the base of the pyramid.

details.description: A group of five visitors stands on the stone paving of the Giza Plateau with a massive ancient limestone pyramid rising directly behind them. The pyramid shows clearly stepped courses of weathered blocks and no surviving smooth casing at the apex, forming a tall triangular profile against a bright, slightly hazy sky. Scattered tourists and low stone remains appear near the base. The setting is arid and open, characteristic of the desert plateau west of the Nile. Lighting is midday, with soft shadows.

details.description: Five tourists stand arm in arm in front of the Great Pyramid on a sunlit day. From left to right: a man wearing a red-and-white keffiyeh, dark long-sleeve shirt, light jeans, and a camera hanging from his neck; a woman in a sage green top and wide black trousers; a woman in a white button-down dress with sunglasses; a woman in a white wrap blouse and black leggings; a man on the far right wearing a black-and-white keffiyeh, sunglasses, a white t-shirt, blue jeans, and holding a green jacket. The massive limestone pyramid dominates the background, with its triangular silhouette and weathered blocks. The ground is dusty, cracked earth, and a few other visitors are visible at the base. The sky is clear with a few clouds.

details.description: Five tourists stand on large pale limestone paving stones with a massive ancient stone pyramid rising directly behind them. The pyramid shows rough, stepped horizontal courses of weathered limestone all the way to a pointed apex, lacking a smooth casing cap, giving a distinctly tiered texture typical of the Great Pyramid of Giza. The scene is on the open Giza Plateau under bright, slightly hazy daylight, with other visitors scattered near the pyramid’s base.

details.description: A group of five tourists pose together on a dusty, cracked plaza in front of the Great Pyramid of Giza in Egypt. The pyramid dominates the background under a bright blue sky. From left to right: a man wearing a red-and-white keffiyeh-style scarf with a camera hanging from his neck; a smiling woman in a light olive-green top and black wide-leg pants; a woman in a white button-down dress with sunglasses; a woman in a white wrap blouse and black leggings with sunglasses; and a man on the far right wearing a black-and-white keffiyeh-like headscarf, sunglasses, a white T-shirt, light blue jeans, and holding a green jacket. Other visitors are visible around the base, emphasizing a popular tourist site.

entities.name: Great Pyramid of Giza
entities.notes: Pyramid; oldest and largest of the Giza pyramids, part of the Giza pyramid complex.

details.description: A group of five young adults stands posing for a photograph on the rocky limestone bedrock of the Giza Plateau, with the massive Great Pyramid of Giza rising prominently in the background. The pyramid's stepped stone masonry dominates the frame, tapering to a rugged, flat top against a blue sky with scattered clouds. The group consists of two men and three women arranged in a line. The man on the far left wears a red and white keffiyeh, a dark blue button-down shirt, jeans, and holds a camera. The man on the far right wears a black and white keffiyeh, a white t-shirt, jeans, and holds an olive-green jacket. The three women in the center are dressed in casual attire: a green t-shirt with black wide-leg pants, a white button-down midi dress, and a white wrap top with black leggings. In the background, near the base of the pyramid, other tourists can be seen walking.

details.description: A group of five tourists stands on the sandy, rocky ground of the Giza Plateau, posing for a photograph. Behind them looms the massive Great Pyramid of Giza, constructed from large limestone blocks. The pyramid's apex is slightly weathered and lacks its original smooth casing stones. The sky is a pale blue with scattered white clouds. The individuals are dressed in casual clothing; two men wear traditional patterned keffiyehs wrapped around their heads. Other tourists and a few vehicles are visible in the distant background at the base of the pyramid.
